msIdentifier.repository: European collection — EFEO estampages union catalogue

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of the Cao Quan stele held in a European collection, catalogued in the EFEO estampages union database (Paris).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

bibl.ref: EFEO estampages database — European Chinese-rubbings union catalogue

revisionDesc.change: Sample. Metadata VIA the EFEO estampages database (estampages.efeo.fr) — the union catalogue of Chinese rubbings across seven European holders (EFEO, Musée Guimet, IHEC, Société asiatique, Bodleian, British Library, Rietberg), i.e. an aggregator, NOT the holding institution's own website. No public IIIF image; links to the EFEO database.
